instruction.title: Competition Requirement Analysis & Technical Design Document
instruction.overview: This document serves as the technical requirements spec sheet for the Premium AI SaaS Landing Page. It outlines the product and engineering requirements for each section on the page to secure maximum judging points.

section.purpose: Establish immediate positioning as the "Premium Data Automation Platform" and display primary CTA.
section.animation: Pure CSS keyframes for text reveal and background gradient shifts (GPU-accelerated properties only).

section.purpose: Establish industry trust by showcasing logos of data-heavy tech organizations.
section.behavior: Pre-configured SVG dimensions, inline vectors, opacity fade-in. No looping carousel.

section.purpose: Explain the core technological engine (pipelines, schema mappings, automated ingestion).
section.layout: CSS Grid/Flexbox. Light viewport reveal triggers via CSS scroll-driven actions.

section.purpose: Showcase platform capabilities in a multi-dimensional grid on desktop (≥ 768px), transforming into a single-open accordion on mobile (< 768px). This is a unified BentoAccordion component that shares active index state across both layout modes.
section.nested_components: Isolated RCC containers within server-rendered grid skeleton cells. useMediaQuery hook for layout switching. Shared activeIndex state that persists across desktop ↔ mobile transitions.
section.animation: 3D transform lift on mouse move (GPU bounds using will-change: transform) on desktop. Mobile accordion panels expand with max-height CSS transitions using --ease-accordion curve (350ms).

section.purpose: Objection handling accordion to address remaining user hesitations before the final CTA.
section.state_scope: Single-open accordion using activeIndex state (number | null) where null = all collapsed.
section.behavior: Headers use aria-expanded. Panels use role="region" with aria-labelledby. Supports keyboard Enter/Space to toggle. Accordion panels expand via max-height transition (350ms, --ease-accordion). chevron-down.svg rotates 180° on expand.

section.purpose: Display subscription plans, billing commitments, and locale-specific currency rates.
section.state_scope: Strict local encapsulation of selected currency, plan tier, and billing cycle. No parent context.
section.behavior: Changes inside pricing selectors must not trigger renders in other sections.

section.purpose: Provide qualitative validation from senior technical leaders (CTOs, Head of Platform).
Final high-contrast action block to convert interest into sign-up funnel.
Secondary navigation, compliance, and legal directory links.

testing_requirements.test: Verify price calculations, annual discount application (20%), and symbol rendering.
Use DevTools Profiler to verify pricing selections trigger zero sibling renders.
Keyboard-only walkthrough (Tab focus visible, Escape locks, touch-targets >= 44px).
Initial render comparison with SSR checks to prevent hydration mismatches.
